name: Greens Galore
recipeIngredient: 10 cups Kale, Swiss Chard, or Mustard Greens (or a combination of these)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the greens thoroughly and chop some of the stems with the leaves.
2. In a large saucepan, cook onions in olive oil or butter until golden brown.
3. Add the chopped onions, greens, water, salt, and pepper to the saucepan.
4. Cover and cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally, just until the greens are tender.
5. Season with additional salt and pepper if needed.
6. Sprinkle with lemon juice, if desired.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
